description: STETHOSCOPE input, Military Cryptanalytics, part I, lesson 7, problem 5

ciphertext.notes: NOTE: Due to a probable NSA coding bug (the ciphertext is input as groups of 3?), (a) The two digraphic cuts were swapped; (b) The trigraphic cuts were rotated: cut_B -> cut_A -> cut_C -> cut_B.  5. The cryptogram below is suspected to begin with the stereotype 'REFERRING TO YOUR MESSAGE' OR 'REFERENCE YOUR MESSAGE'. Solve the text and recover all keys.
